subcodes.first_line: Strive ye, that through the grace of the All-Merciful and the bounty of the All-Glorious, ye may remain steadfast and immovable in His Cause, for the hosts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جهد نمائید که از عنایت رحمانی و فضل سبحانی بر امر ثابت و مستقیم باشید چه که جنود
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
